overall.description: A cinematic drone shot orbiting the magnificent Gothic Beauclair Palace from The Witcher 3, perched on a mountainside. The footage showcases intricate stone architecture with pointed spires, red rooftops, and a massive blue stained glass window, set against snow-capped mountains and a winding river valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic palace side facade with ornate balconies and stone arcades

events.description: Camera rounds the corner revealing the front facade with massive blue stained glass window

agents.ego_description: Slowly orbiting laterally along the palace side, examining architectural details of the stone facade

entered.detail: Ornate white stone Gothic palace with flying buttresses and pointed arches
Tall spires with distinctive red roofing tiles
Intricately carved stone railings and terrace balconies
Mountain range with snow visible on peaks in background
Large ornate blue glowing stained glass window on front facade
Grand stone staircase leading to main entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a close drone view of the palace's side facade, showcasing detailed Gothic stonework and balconies. As the camera orbits left, it rounds the corner around 12 seconds to reveal the magnificent front facade dominated by a glowing blue stained glass window. The snow-capped mountains remain visible in the background throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: Palace courtyard and main entrance with cliff edge

events.description: Camera begins pulling back significantly, revealing the palace sits on a cliff edge

agents.ego_description: Pulling back from the front facade to reveal the full scale of the palace and its dramatic cliffside position

entered.detail: Open courtyard area at the palace entrance with stone paving
Steep rocky cliff showing the palace's elevated position
Distant river visible in the valley below
Green vegetation and gardens at the palace base

segments.scene_description: The camera pulls back from the front facade, revealing the palace courtyard and showing the structure perched dramatically on a cliff edge. Around 30 seconds, the pull-back accelerates, exposing the river valley below and the palace gardens. The blue stained glass window shrinks from a dominant feature to a central accent as the view widens.

scene_state.functional_zone: Aerial view of palace overlooking expansive river valley and distant town

events.description: Wide landscape reveals the full river valley, distant town, and surrounding mountain ranges

agents.ego_description: Wide aerial orbit showing the palace in full context of the surrounding landscape, river, and distant settlements

entered.detail: Blue river winding through the green valley below
Small settlement or village visible along the river banks
Dense green forest covering the mountain slopes
Wide valley view showing the scale of the landscape

segments.scene_description: The final segment presents a majestic wide aerial view, placing the palace in its full geographical context. The camera reveals the winding river, distant town, and expansive forested valleys surrounding the castle. The palace shifts to the left of frame as the landscape dominates, ending with a sweeping view of the mountains and sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drone orbit that transforms from an intimate study of Gothic architecture into a sweeping aerial panorama of a mountain valley. It begins with a close-up of the palace's side facade and detailed stonework, orbiting left to reveal the front facade dominated by a glowing blue stained glass window against a backdrop of snow-capped peaks. As the camera pulls back, the view expands to reveal the palace courtyard and the dramatic cliff edge upon which the structure is perched. This movement accelerates to expose the palace gardens and the river valley below, causing the blue window to shrink from a dominant feature into a central accent. The scene finally opens into a majestic wide shot, shifting the palace to the side of the frame to showcase the winding river, a distant town, and the expansive forested valleys beneath a vast sky.
